arts.ttl: How Slot immediately reacted in the stands after bizarre Mo Salah penalty call
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot appeared bemused by the referee’s decision to award Newcastle with a free-kick with Mohamed Salah and Lewis Hall collided. During the Premier League contest at Anfield, the Magpies left-back chased down the veteran, seemingly tripping him up. arts.ttl: Martin Keown makes Arsenal concession in message to three Liverpool stars - 'can't complain'
arts.sum: Martin Keown has given his honest verdict on former club Arsenal's title challenge against Premier League leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Martin Keown insists Arsenal HAVEN'T taken a step backwards this season - despite Mikel Arteta's players sitting 10 points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners have challenged for the ultimate honours in the English top flight for a number of seasons, but have failed to overturn Manchester City the last two times of asking.

arts.ttl: Report: Man City enquire about signing Newcastle defender
arts.sum: Manchester City have reportedly set their sights on Newcastle United full-back Tino Livramento as they plan for the summer transfer window. The Telegraph suggest that Pep Guardiola’s head has been turned in his quest to fill in the void left by Kyle Walker, who left for AC Milan in January. arts.ttl: Alexander Isak hands Newcastle injury scare before Carabao Cup final as striker ruled out vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak has been ruled out of the Premier League clash at Liverpool this evening

arts.ttl: I can't accept Nunez's work-rate - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says he "can't accept" striker Darwin Nunez's work-rate in his past two games.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Hardman Steve McMahon Named His 'Best' Teammate - Snubbed Rush & Dalglish
arts.sum: Liverpool hardman Steve McMahon named his 'best' teammate but snubbed Anfield icons Ian Rush and Kenny Dalglish.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool director Ian Graham opens up on Mohamed Salah contract situation
arts.sum: Former Liverpool director of research Ian Graham has spoken about the future of Mohamed Salah at the FT Business of Football Summit. arts.ttl: Newcastle confirm Alexander Isak injury blow with striker OUT of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Newcastle have been dealt a huge blow ahead of their pivotal Premier League match away at Liverpool with the news that Alexander Isak misses out due to a groin injury
